anomaly.title: Deepak Verma (E-015) is paid to the same bank account as Vikram Kulkarni (E-007)
anomaly.detail: Two employees draw salary to one identical bank account. Deepak Verma has the thinner footprint (recent join / no other records) — a likely ghost employee whose pay is diverted to Vikram Kulkarni. 2,16,000 in payroll.

anomaly.title: 54,200 paid 2× — INV-2025-0229 NEFT Aravalli Components -
